CORRECTS PREVIOUS HAIL REPORT FROM 5 SW HOLLY POND. THE NWS IN HUNTSVILLE SURVEYED EXTENSIVE DAMAGE FROM A HAIL SWATH FROM CULLMAN TO THE WALTER COMMUNITY. THE LARGEST STONE THUS FAR WAS MEASURED AT A RESIDENCE IN WALTER NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF CR 703 AND CR 768. THE OFFICIAL MEASUREMENT WAS 5.25 INCHES IN DIAMETER, CIRCUMFERENCE OF 13.75 INCHES AND WEIGHT OF 8.9 OUNCES.
